title: Copper X
description: This mod adds Copper Armour and Copper weapons
body:
This mod adds Copper Items (Weapons, armour, and some items) :)

Its my first mod and i am going to update it.

Join my discord and report any bugs 
https://discord.gg/rN5fXy83

Version: Forge 1.20.1
Neoforge 1.21.8

Soon it coming to Fabric.
